title: Altitude Sickness│高山症
description: Mobs occasionally suffers from oxygen deprivation at high altitudes.│生物在高海拔地區偶爾會遭受缺氧的困擾。
body:
# Function│功能
Non-undead mobs will develop altitude sickness when their heads are at a position y>192, will have a `1/(320-current head height)` chance of taking damage from lack of oxygen per second.│非亡靈生物頭部在y>192的地方會產生高山症，每秒有`1/(320-當前頭部所處高度)`概率受到缺氧傷害。
# Usage example video│使用示例影片
